---
title: "Seurat to h5ad LogNorm RNA 4dpi"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
A2N_5 <- readRDS('/merged_5_A2N2.rds')
```

```{r}
# Check number of scaled genes
nrow(A2N_5@assays$RNA@layers$scale.data)
Layers(A2N_5[["RNA"]])
```

```{r}
A2N_5$RV <- factor(A2N_5$RV,levels=c("Control", "Ascl1WT", "Ascl1WTBcl2","Ascl1SA6","Ascl1SA6Bcl2"))
print(table(A2N_5$RV))
Idents(A2N_5) <- "RV"
A2N_5 <- subset(A2N_5, downsample=1500)
print(table(A2N_5$RV))
DimPlot(A2N_5, group.by = 'RV', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
```

```{r}
# Convert to V3/4/Assay structure)
A2N_5.v3 <- Convert_Assay(seurat_object = A2N_5, convert_to = "V3")

write.csv(GetAssayData(A2N_5.v3, layer = "scale.data"),
          "/Users/alexiscooper/The Francis Crick Dropbox/GuillemotF/Dropbox Alexis Cooper/Cooper_et_al_2025/4dpi/Preperation for R_to_python/gene_counts_matrix/A2N2_5_scaled_matrix_210525.csv")
write.csv(GetAssayData(A2N_5.v3, layer = "data"),
          "/Users/alexiscooper/The Francis Crick Dropbox/GuillemotF/Dropbox Alexis Cooper/Cooper_et_al_2025/4dpi/Preperation for R_to_python/gene_counts_matrix/A2N2_5_data_210525.csv")

# Check number of scaled genes
nrow(A2N_5.v3@assays$RNA$scale.data)
nrow(A2N_5.v3@assays$RNA$data)
nrow(A2N_5.v3@assays$RNA$counts)

A2N_5.v3 <- A2N_5.v3 %>%
  DietSeurat(., assays = "RNA", layers = c("counts"), dimreducs = c("pca", "umap")) 
# Convert to V3/4/Assay structure)
A2N_5.v3 <- Convert_Assay(seurat_object = A2N_5, convert_to = "V3")
```

```{r}
# Convert categorical metadata columns to characters for compatibility
metadata_cols <- c("orig.ident", "RV", "sample_type", "timepoint", "Phase", 
                   "miQC.keep","seurat_clusters","cell.type")
A2N_5.v3@meta.data[metadata_cols] <- lapply(A2N_5.v3@meta.data[metadata_cols], as.character)
# Remove dots from column names to avoid Python issues
colnames(A2N_5.v3@meta.data) <- str_replace_all(colnames(A2N_5.v3@meta.data), "\\.", "_")
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(A2N_5.v3) <- "RNA"
fileout <- "/4dpi_A2N2_5.h5Seurat"
SaveH5Seurat(A2N_5.v3, filename = fileout, overwrite = TRUE)
Convert(fileout, dest = "h5ad", overwrite = TRUE)
```

#### "Control","Ascl1WTBcl2","Ascl1SA6Bcl2","SA6Dlx2"

```{r}
mergeAll_filtered <- readRDS("/seurat_4dpi_merged_LogNorm.rds")      
```

mergeAll_4 \<- subset(mergeAll_filtered, subset = RV %in% c("Control","Ascl1WTBcl2","Ascl1SA6Bcl2","SA6Dlx2"))

```{r}
mergeAll_4 <- subset(mergeAll_filtered, subset = RV %in% c("Control","Ascl1WTBcl2","Ascl1SA6Bcl2","Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"))
```

```{r}
print(table(mergeAll_4$RV))
Idents(mergeAll_4) <- "RV"
mergeAll_4 <- subset(mergeAll_4, downsample=1882)
print(table(mergeAll_4$RV))
```

```{r}
mergeAll_4 <- RunPCA(mergeAll_4, assay = "RNA")


# Step 2: Integrate the layers using the RPCA method
integrated.mergeAll_filtered <- IntegrateLayers(
  object = mergeAll_filtered,  # Your Seurat object
  method = RPCAIntegration,  # Integration method (RPCA)
  orig.reduction = "pca",  # Original PCA reduction
  new.reduction = "integrated.rpca",  # New integrated reduction name
  normalization.method = "LogNorm",  # Log-normalization before integration
  verbose = TRUE  # Display progress
)
```

```{r}
# Step 1: Access the RNA assay of the Seurat object
rna_assay <- mergeAll_4[["RNA"]]

# Step 2: List the layers in the RNA assay
layers_to_rename <- names(rna_assay@layers)

# Step 3: Define the old and new names for the layers
old_name <- "Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"  # Old name to be replaced
new_name <- "SA6Dlx2"         # New name for the layer

# Step 4: Rename layers and update column/row names explicitly for the "Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2" layer
if ("counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2" %in% layers_to_rename) {
  colnames(rna_assay@layers[["counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]) <- gsub(old_name, new_name, colnames(rna_assay@layers[["counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]))
  rownames(rna_assay@layers[["counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]) <- gsub(old_name, new_name, rownames(rna_assay@layers[["counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]))
  rna_assay@layers[["counts.SA6Dlx2"]] <- rna_assay@layers[["counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]
  rna_assay@layers[["counts.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]] <- NULL
}

if ("data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2" %in% layers_to_rename) {
  colnames(rna_assay@layers[["data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]) <- gsub(old_name, new_name, colnames(rna_assay@layers[["data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]))
  rownames(rna_assay@layers[["data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]) <- gsub(old_name, new_name, rownames(rna_assay@layers[["data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]))
  rna_assay@layers[["data.SA6Dlx2"]] <- rna_assay@layers[["data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]
  rna_assay@layers[["data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]] <- NULL
}

if ("scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2" %in% layers_to_rename) {
  colnames(rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]) <- gsub(old_name, new_name, colnames(rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]))
  rownames(rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]) <- gsub(old_name, new_name, rownames(rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]))
  rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.SA6Dlx2"]] <- rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]]
  rna_assay@layers[["scale.data.Ascl1SA6Dlx2_2"]] <- NULL
}

# Step 5: Verify the renaming
print(names(rna_assay@layers))  # Should now show the updated layer names

```

```{r}
rna_assay <- mergeAll_4[["RNA"]]
mergeAll_4 <- RunPCA(mergeAll_4, assay = "RNA")

# Step 2: Integrate the layers using the RPCA method
integrated.mergeAll_4 <- IntegrateLayers(
  object = mergeAll_4,  # Your Seurat object
  method = "RPCAIntegration",  # Integration method (RPCA)
  orig.reduction = "pca",  # Original PCA reduction
  new.reduction = "integrated.rpca",  # New integrated reduction name
  normalization.method = "LogNorm",  # Log-normalization before integration
  verbose = TRUE  # Display progress
)

# Step 3: Verify the integrated object


(integrated.mergeAll_4)
```

```{r Visualisation, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, , fig.width=6, fig.height=4 }
print(table(mergeAll_4$RV))
Idents(mergeAll_4) <- "RV"
mergeAll_4 <- subset(mergeAll_4, downsample=1882)
print(table(mergeAll_4$RV))
```

```{r}
mergeAll_4 <- mergeAll_4 %>%
  DietSeurat(., assays = "RNA", layers = c("counts"))
mergeAll_4 <- NormalizeData(mergeAll_4, assay = "RNA")
mergeAll_4 <- FindVariableFeatures(mergeAll_4)
mergeAll_4 <- ScaleData(mergeAll_4, features = rownames(mergeAll_4))
mergeAll_4 <- RunPCA(mergeAll_4, features = VariableFeatures(mergeAll_4), verbose = TRUE)
mergeAll_4 <- FindNeighbors(object = mergeAll_4, dims = 1:40) 
mergeAll_4 <- FindClusters(object = mergeAll_4, resolution = 1.2)
mergeAll_4 <- RunUMAP(object = mergeAll_4, dims = 1:16)
DimPlot(mergeAll_4, group.by = 'seurat_clusters', pt.size = 0.5, label = TRUE) + Blank_Theme()
DimPlot(mergeAll_4, group.by = 'RV', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme()
```

FeaturePlot(mergeAll_4, features = c("Top2a"), cols = c("lightgrey", "blue")) & Blank_Theme() & theme(plot.title = element_blank())

```{r}
mergeAll_4_new<- RenameIdents(mergeAll_4,
                         `0` = "Neuron_like3", 
                         `1` = "Microglia",
                         `2` = "Astrocyte_like",
                         `3` = "Neuron_like2",
                         `4` = "Astrocyte_like", 
                         `5` = "Intermediate", 
                         `6` = "Intermediate",
                         `7` = "OPCs", 
                         `8` = "Astrocytes",
                         `9` = "Intermediate",
                         `10` = "cycling",
                         `11` = "Neuron_like1", 
                         `12` = "Neuron_like",
                         `13` = "remove",
                         `14` = "Intermediate_OPC",
                         `15` = "Astrocytes", 
                         `16` = "Neuron_like", 
                         `17` = "cycling",
                         `18` = "Neuron_like4", 
                         `19` = "Microglia",
                         `20` = "Oligodendrocytes",
                         `21` = "cycling_OPCs",
                         `22` = "Microglia", 
                         `23` = "remove", 
                         `24` = "Microglia",
                         `25` = "remove", 
                         `26` = "remove",
                         `27` = "Microglia",
                         `28` = "cycling",
                         `29` = "Pericytes", 
                         `30` = "Microglia", 
                         `31` = "cycling_OPCs", 
                         `32` = "remove", 
                         `33` = "remove")


mergeAll_4_new[["cell.type"]] <- Idents(object = mergeAll_4_new)
#mergeAll_4_new$cell.type <- factor(mergeAll_4_new$cell.type, levels = c("Astrocytes","cycling", "Astrocyte_like", "Intermediate", "Neuron_like1", "Neuron_like2" ))
DimPlot(mergeAll_4_new, group.by = 'cell.type', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
DimPlot(mergeAll_4_new, split.by = 'RV', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
DimPlot(mergeAll_4_new, group.by = 'seurat_clusters', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 

```

```{r}
mergeAll_4_new <- subset(mergeAll_4_new, subset = cell.type %in% c("remove"), invert = TRUE)
DimPlot(mergeAll_4_new, group.by = 'cell.type', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
```

```{r}
selected_cell_types <- c("Neuron_like3", "Astrocyte_like", "Intermediate", "Neuron_like1", "cycling",  "Astrocytes", "Neuron_like2", "Neuron_like3", "Neuron_like4")
A2N <- subset(mergeAll_4_new, subset = cell.type %in% selected_cell_types)
DimPlot(A2N, group.by = "cell.type", shuffle = TRUE)
```

```{r}
A2N_5 <- NormalizeData(A2N, assay = "RNA")
A2N_5 <- FindVariableFeatures(A2N_5)
A2N_5 <- ScaleData(A2N_5, features = rownames(A2N_5))
A2N_5 <- RunPCA(A2N_5, features = VariableFeatures(A2N_5), verbose = TRUE)
A2N_5 <- FindNeighbors(object = A2N_5, dims = 1:40) 
A2N_5 <- FindClusters(object = A2N_5, resolution = 0.8)
A2N_5 <- RunUMAP(object = A2N_5, dims = 1:27)
DimPlot(A2N_5, group.by = 'cell.type', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
DimPlot(A2N_5, group.by = 'seurat_clusters', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 

```

```{r}
saveRDS(A2N_5, '/seurat_4dpi_LogNorm_newID_merged_5_A2N2.rds')
A2N_5 <- readRDS('/seurat_4dpi_LogNorm_newID_merged_5_A2N2.rds')
```

```{r}
A2N_5 <- A2N %>%
  DietSeurat(., assays = "RNA", layers = c("counts"))
A2N_5 <- NormalizeData(A2N_5, assay = "RNA")
A2N_5 <- FindVariableFeatures(A2N_5)
A2N_5 <- ScaleData(A2N_5, features = rownames(A2N_5))
A2N_5 <- RunPCA(A2N_5, features = VariableFeatures(A2N_5), verbose = TRUE)
A2N_5 <- FindNeighbors(object = A2N_5, dims = 1:40) 
A2N_5 <- FindClusters(object = A2N_5, resolution = 0.8)
A2N_5 <- RunUMAP(object = A2N_5, dims = 1:27)
DimPlot(A2N_5, group.by = 'cell.type', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
DimPlot(A2N_5, group.by = 'seurat_clusters', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 

# Check number of scaled genes
nrow(A2N_5@assays$RNA@layers$scale.data)
Layers(A2N_5[["RNA"]])
```

```{r}
A2N_5$RV <- factor(A2N_5$RV,levels=c("Control", "Ascl1WT", "Ascl1WTBcl2","Ascl1SA6","Ascl1SA6Bcl2"))
print(table(A2N_5$RV))
Idents(A2N_5) <- "RV"
A2N_5 <- subset(A2N_5, downsample=1500)
print(table(A2N_5$RV))
DimPlot(A2N_5, group.by = 'RV', pt.size = 0.5) + Blank_Theme() 
```

```{r}
# Convert to V3/4/Assay structure)
A2N_5.v3 <- Convert_Assay(seurat_object = A2N_5, convert_to = "V3")

write.csv(GetAssayData(A2N_5.v3, layer = "scale.data"),
          "/A2N2_5_scaled_matrix.csv")
write.csv(GetAssayData(A2N_5.v3, layer = "data"),
          "/A2N2_5_data.csv")

# Check number of scaled genes
nrow(A2N_5.v3@assays$RNA$scale.data)
nrow(A2N_5.v3@assays$RNA$data)
nrow(A2N_5.v3@assays$RNA$counts)

A2N_5.v3 <- A2N_5.v3 %>%
  DietSeurat(., assays = "RNA", layers = c("counts"), dimreducs = c("pca", "umap")) 
# Convert to V3/4/Assay structure)
A2N_5.v3 <- Convert_Assay(seurat_object = A2N_5, convert_to = "V3")
```

```{r}
# Convert categorical metadata columns to characters for compatibility
metadata_cols <- c("orig.ident", "RV", "sample_type", "timepoint", "Phase", 
                   "miQC.keep","seurat_clusters","cell.type")
A2N_5.v3@meta.data[metadata_cols] <- lapply(A2N_5.v3@meta.data[metadata_cols], as.character)
# Remove dots from column names to avoid Python issues
colnames(A2N_5.v3@meta.data) <- str_replace_all(colnames(A2N_5.v3@meta.data), "\\.", "_")
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(A2N_5.v3) <- "RNA"
fileout <- "/4dpi_A2N2_5.h5Seurat"
SaveH5Seurat(A2N_5.v3, filename = fileout, overwrite = TRUE)
Convert(fileout, dest = "h5ad", overwrite = TRUE)
```
